title: Resolution suspending the implementation of the Number Coding Scheme as provided in the Municipal Ordinance No. 2011-1082 in the areas of Barangay Bayog and Barangay Mayondon on October 3-4, 2019 in celebration of the Barangay Fiesta in Barangay Bayog, Los Baños, Laguna. (Author : Hon. Marlo PJ A. Alipon, REE, RMP, MPA, 09/27/19)
